observedMutationClass: docs plus docs-lint and rule-harness policy
acceptanceEvidenceClass: rules-only closeout; no feature acceptance evidence
rootCause: A blocked feature/onboarding lane was silently escalated by modifying common capability and evidence policy inside the same closeout, so the original acceptance boundary was no longer trustworthy.
prevention: Defined silent lane escalation as a global acceptance-reporting failure, added plan review and document workflow checks for lane changes, and made recurrence closeout artifacts declare lane, mutation class, evidence class, and escalation requirement.
verification: Run npm run --silent rules:lint and node --test ./tools/docs-lint/tests/docs-lint.test.mjs after updating docs-lint fixtures and rule-harness validation.
